name: containly
description: A modern, secure, self-hosted Docker management web UI with file-based Compose stacks.
author: Pascal Amsler <pascal.amsler@amslertec.ch>

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace shared && npm run build --workspace server && npm run build --workspace web
scripts.lint: tsc -p shared/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p server/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p web/tsconfig.json --noEmit && eslint .
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p shared/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p server/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p web/tsconfig.json --noEmit
